account.a: Click “Forgot password” on the login page to reset via phone verification.
Go to Settings to update your nickname, avatar and other info.
Contact support to submit a deletion request, processed within 3 business days.

payment.a: WeChat Pay, Alipay, Stripe credit card and USDC.
Contact support within 7 days of subscription for a full refund.
Click “Cancel subscription” on the pricing page. Billing stops next cycle.

project.a: Click “New Project” in the workspace and enter a name.
Free plan: 1 project. Pro and above: unlimited.
Open project details and click “Share” to generate a link.

ai.a: GPT-4, Claude 3.5, Gemini and more. Pro unlocks all models.
Use the model selector at the top of the chat page.

tech.q: How to get an API Key?
tech.a: Create an app on the Developer platform to get an API Key.
Default 60 requests/min. Enterprise can request higher limits.
Official SDKs for Python, Node.js and Go.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about our platform and team
about.introDesc1: IHUI is a comprehensive platform focused on AI education and knowledge sharing, dedicated to providing users with high-quality learning resources and intelligent learning experiences.
about.introDesc2: We bring together rich course content, hands-on projects, and community resources to help every learner grow efficiently.
about.introDesc3: Through AI-empowered education, we make learning smarter, more efficient, and more fun.
about.addressValue: Zhongguancun Software Park, Haidian District, Beijing
about.missionDesc1: Making AI technology accessible to every learner, breaking down barriers to knowledge.
about.missionDesc2: Building an open, shared, and intelligent educational ecosystem to promote lifelong learning.

agreement.title: Agreements & Policies
agreement.subtitle: Please read the following agreements carefully
agreement.staticContent1: Welcome to our platform. By using our services, you agree to all terms of this agreement.
agreement.staticContent2: We strictly protect your personal privacy and will not disclose it to third parties without your permission.
agreement.staticContent3: If you have any questions about this agreement, please contact customer service.
